chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1064 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025 Petitioner Asad Ali is present in person. Mr. Zia-ul-Haque Kamboh, Advocate for respondents No.5 and 6. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The counsel for respondents No.5 and 6 files statement along with certain documents, which is taken on record. Copy thereof has been provided to the Counsel for the petitioner. The Petitioner files statement, seeks disposal of instant petition on the ground that his grievance has been redressed. Mr. Zia, submits that appointment order has been issued to petitioner and he has joined his duty as Naib Qasid (BPS-02) against the post lying vacant in the office of Town Committee Halani. Under the circumstances, instant petition is disposed of, accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
